init_session: create a new MCP tracking session and write the session header to a markdown log file
record_call: append a tool call record with arguments, result, and latency to the session log file
update_ranking: write the current tool ranking index as a markdown table to a session ranking file
write_session_summary: append a session summary table with success rate, latency, and call counts to the log
write_global_stats: write cross-session tool performance statistics as a markdown table to the global stats file
